_note: beads is the canonical origin for work-item state; GitHub Projects (Front Desk) is a projection. Items with projected=false explain empty chart segments ('No Kind', 'No Milestone'). Full edge model: docs/beads-projection.md.

edgeTypes.parent-child: GitHub native sub-issues (projected — Auto-add sub-issues workflow)

projections.notes: Lifecycle workflows: item added→Todo, PR linked→In Progress, closed/merged→Done. bd ready = Todo with no open Depends on.
